mapper.insert:
insert into batch.job_task ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, task_type, task_seq, task_status, assigned_worker_code, task_payload, effective_parameters, result_summary, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, priority, started_at, finished_at, dry_run, task_timeout_seconds ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{jobPartitionId}, #{taskType}, #{taskSeq}, #{taskStatus}, #{assignedWorkerCode}, #{taskPayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{effectiveParameters,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorKey}, #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, coalesce(#{priority}, 5), #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt},
#{dryRun} false , #{taskTimeoutSeconds} )

insert into batch.job_task ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, task_type, task_seq, task_status, assigned_worker_code, task_payload, effective_parameters, result_summary, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, priority, started_at, finished_at, dry_run, task_timeout_seconds ) values
( #{e.tenantId}, #{e.jobInstanceId}, #{e.jobPartitionId}, #{e.taskType}, #{e.taskSeq}, #{e.taskStatus}, #{e.assignedWorkerCode}, #{e.taskPayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{e.effectiveParameters,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{e.resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{e.errorCode}, #{e.errorMessage}, #{e.errorKey}, #{e.errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, coalesce(#{e.priority}, 5), #{e.startedAt}, #{e.finishedAt},
#{e.dryRun} false , #{e.taskTimeoutSeconds} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, failure_class = #{failureClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finished_at = case when #{taskStatus} in (#{terminalStatus1}, #{terminalStatus2}, #{terminalStatus3}, #{terminalStatus4}) then current_timestamp else finished_at end, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion} and ( task_status = #{taskStatus} or task_status not in ('SUCCESS','FAILED','CANCELLED','TERMINATED') )

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, failure_class = #{failureClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finished_at = current_timestamp, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and task_status = #{expectedStatus} and version = #{expectedVersion}

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{readyStatus}, assigned_worker_code = null, error_code = null, error_message = null, error_key = null, error_args = null, failure_class = null, result_summary = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion} and task_status in ('READY','RUNNING','FAILED')

update batch.job_task set task_payload = #{taskPayload}::jsonb, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and task_status not in ('SUCCESS','FAILED','CANCELLED','TERMINATED')

update batch.job_task set heartbeat_details = #{heartbeatDetails}::jsonb, heartbeat_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and task_status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.select: select * from batch.job_task where task_status = 'RUNNING' and cancel_requested = false and started_at is not null and task_timeout_seconds is not null and task_timeout_seconds > 0 and started_at < current_timestamp - (task_timeout_seconds * interval '1 second') order by started_at asc, id asc limit #{limit}
mapper.update: update batch.job_task set cancel_requested = true, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and task_status = 'RUNNING' and cancel_requested = false

update batch.job_task set cancel_requested = true, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId} and task_status = 'RUNNING' and cancel_requested = false

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{targetTaskStatus}, finished_at = current_timestamp, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId} and task_status in ('CREATED', 'READY', 'RUNNING')
